scenario_description: 用户逐步把一批组件素材整理成 handoff 包：先建目录，再加入预览图，最后生成清单和压缩包。

command: from pathlib import Path; import shutil; src=Path('/home/user/Desktop/component_drop_203'); out=Path('/home/user/Desktop/component_handoff_203'); shutil.rmtree(src, ignore_errors=True); shutil.rmtree(out, ignore_errors=True); src.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); (src/'button_preview.png').write_text('button', encoding='utf-8'); (src/'modal_preview.png').write_text('modal', encoding='utf-8'); (src/'component_notes.txt').write_text('notes', encoding='utf-8'); (out/'assets').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); (out/'previews').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); (out/'notes').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

phases.instruction: 先把 component_handoff_203 这个交接目录搭好，里面要有 assets、previews、notes 三个子目录。
再把 button_preview.png 和 modal_preview.png 放进 previews，把 component_notes.txt 放进 notes。
最后在 component_handoff_203/manifest.txt 里按顺序写 previews/button_preview.png、previews/modal_preview.png、notes/component_notes.txt 三行，并把整个 component_handoff_203 打成 component_handoff_203.zip。

result.command: python -c "from pathlib import Path; import zipfile; base=Path('/home/user/Desktop/component_handoff_203'); z=Path('/home/user/Desktop/component_handoff_203.zip'); expected='previews/button_preview.png\npreviews/modal_preview.png\nnotes/component_notes.txt'; actual=(base/'manifest.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8').strip() if (base/'manifest.txt').exists() else ''; ok=(base/'previews/button_preview.png').exists() and (base/'previews/modal_preview.png').exists() and (base/'notes/component_notes.txt').exists() and actual==expected and z.exists(); names=set(zipfile.ZipFile(z).namelist()) if ok else set(); ok=ok and {'component_handoff_203/previews/button_preview.png','component_handoff_203/previews/modal_preview.png','component_handoff_203/notes/component_notes.txt','component_handoff_203/manifest.txt'}.issubset(names); print('PASS' if ok else 'FAIL')"
